ci_commands_found: go build ./... - Build the entire repo
sources: magefile.go - Check target runs Fmt, Vet, and TestRace
.github/workflows/test.yml - CI runs staticcheck and mage check
check.sh - Script runs gofmt, staticcheck, and tests
p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 5 pass_to_pass tests covering standard Go CI checks. The Hugo repo uses mage for build automation but standard go commands work. Go 1.25 is auto-downloaded via GOTOOLCHAIN=auto. Tests target core packages related to the fix (markup/converter/hooks, hugolib).
